videos.title: Write better CSS using logical properties
videos.description: Explores CSS logical properties for margin, border, padding, sizing, positioning, and how they handle different writing directions and languages.

videos.title: In-Depth Guide to CSS Logical Properties
videos.description: Comprehensive guide covering why to use logical properties, how inline and block dimensions work, and practical migration from physical properties.

videos.title: 23 CSS features you should know (and be using) by now
videos.description: Covers logical property concepts including inset logical properties and how they adapt to different writing modes.

videos.title: 5 simple tips to making responsive layouts the easy way
videos.description: Responsive design principles that complement logical properties for creating truly writing-mode-aware layouts.
